creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to VVD from comment #4)
I had patches first (else I wouldn't have marked this as duplicate - first patch wins, or something).
Please note: your babl patch is missing a vala dependency - valac is required for generating the vapi files (you would have to disable vala and remove the vapi files or add the dependency). That's why poudriere or similar is important: else you risk missing build dependencies which were installed in the host system anyways.
